inputs.text: Main thaka hua mehsoos kar raha hoon, bukhar bhi hai
Meri khaansi shuru ho gayi hai, sookhi khaansi hai

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Persistent dry cough is common in bronchitis

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely with new cough symptoms

inputs.text: Mere cough ki samasya ab bhi hai, raat ko mujhe bahut pasina aata hai, aur wazan bhi kam ho raha hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Chronic cough, night sweats, and weight loss are cardinal signs of Tuberculosis

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely with systemic symptoms like night sweats and weight loss

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely without acute symptoms like high fever and chills

inputs.text: Mere halat aur bhi kharab ho gaye hain, main bahut kamzor mehsoos kar raha hoon, aur meri khaansi mein kabhi-kabhi khoon bhi aata hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Chronic symptoms and hemoptysis confirm Tuberculosis

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to lack of response to treatment and presence of hemoptysis

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to chronic nature of symptoms and presence of hemoptysis
